---
name: summarize_layout
description: generate layout summary for GUI code
---

Create a markdown document including a table summarizing which components are taking up which columns and rows in the layout. Also summarize which spaces are unoccupied. 

Include a brief description of the layout structure and any notable features or patterns observed in the code.

Include text graphs or diagrams if they would help illustrate the layout structure.

Place the updated markdown file (or update existing file) under `documentation\layouts\[filename]_layout.md`
